title: The AI Application Spending Report: Where Startup Dollars Really Go
body: Analysis of AI application spending patterns
Data source: Mercury's database of over 200,000 customers
Period: June-August 2025

title: Report Overview
body: Horizontal vs. vertical company spending distribution
Creative tools category dominance
Vertical application focus areas
Individual adoption patterns

title: Horizontal vs. Vertical Split
body: Horizontal companies make up 60% of the list
Vertical companies represent 40% of the list
Analysis covers Mercury's database of over 200,000 customers during June-August 2025

title: Creative Tools: The Largest Category
body: Creative tools represent the largest single category with ten companies on the list
Freepik ranks at #4 position
ElevenLabs ranks at #5 position

title: Vertical Application Breakdown
body: Seventeen vertical application companies identified in total
Data from Mercury's database analysis of June-August 2025

title: Human Augmentation Focus
body: Twelve vertical companies focus on supercharging humans
This represents the majority approach among vertical applications

title: AI Employee Solutions
body: Five vertical companies aim to serve as AI employees
These companies target full task automation rather than human augmentation

title: Individual Adoption Rate
body: Nearly 70% of companies can be adopted by individuals
This indicates strong bottom-up adoption patterns in AI applications

title: Consumer Top 100 Overlap
body: 12 companies also appeared on the Consumer Top 100 list
This demonstrates crossover between business and consumer AI applications

title: Individual Product Origins
body: 11 companies had started as individual products
These companies later expanded beyond their initial individual-focused offerings
This represents the majority of companies appearing on both lists

title: Data Methodology
body: Analysis examined spending across Mercury's database
Database contains over 200,000 customers
Time period covered: June-August 2025

title: Key Insights Summary
body: Horizontal solutions dominate at 60% market presence
Creative tools lead category spending with ten companies
Individual adoption drives nearly 70% of AI application usage
Human augmentation outpaces full AI employee solutions 12 to 5
